texto: If we really believe the gospel we proclaim, we'll be honest about our own beauty and brokenness, and the beautiful broken One will make himself known to our neighbors through the chinks in our armor - and in theirs.
explicacao: Citação de Fil Anderson sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “If we really believe the gospel we proclaim, we'll be honest about our own beauty and brokenness,…” articula autoestima, evangelism, gospel em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como gospel.
